channel.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Sep 19th - Sep 25th, 2022
item.description:
Community

Blogs

  • Azure Load Testing Blog - By Microsoft Tech Community.

    • Cloud Services / SaaS

  • Azure Microsoft - Azure Load Testing Service use Apache JMeter.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Sep 12th - Sep 18th, 2022
item.description:
Automation

Conversion

  • postman2jmxstars126 - Postman collection to JMeter jmx file converter.
  • convert-postman-jmeterstars6 - Convert Postman projects to JMeter.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Jun 27th - Jul 3rd, 2022
item.description:
Scripting

  • Beanshell vs JSR223 vs Java JMeter Scripting - Most popular scripting mechanisms performance comparison.

    Streaming Protocols

  • How to Test Video Streaming with JMeter

    • Performance Testing

    Mobile Apps

  • Load Testing Mobile Apps Made Easy

    Blogs

  • BlazeMeter Blog - BlazeMeter blog about JMeter and performance testing.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Jun 13th - Jun 19th, 2022
item.description:
Related

Other

  • How They Load Teststars17 - A curated collection of publicly available resources on how companies around the world perform load testing.
  • Load Testing Toolkitstars69 - Collection of open-source tools for debugging, benchmarking, load and stress testing your code or services.

item.description:

Frameworks

  • JMeter Load Testing Centerstars185 - Online web-application/dashboard to run, monitor and analyze results of load tests using JMeter.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Apr 5th - Apr 11th, 2021
item.description:
Tools

Editors

  • BlocklyJMX Editor - A web-based viewer and editor for JMeter test plan files (part of JMeter Plugins project).
  • JEvalstars26 - A Python-based utility which evaluates JMeter test plan and provides recommendations and best practices by analyzing each element.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Feb 22nd - Feb 28th, 2021
item.description:

Forums

    Blogs

  • JMeter Basics - By João Farias.
  • JMeter Series - Sourcepole blog 💀.

  • Load Testing with JMeter - By Brandon Konkle.
  • JMeter Resources - By Dejan Lukan.
  • JMeter Tutorial - By Tutorials Point.
  • JMeter Tutorial for Load Testing: The Ultimate Guide - By Daniel Gutierrez Diez.
  • Load Testing with Apache JMeter - By DigitalOcean.
  • JMeter Tutorial for Beginners - By Guru99.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Feb 15th - Feb 21st, 2021
item.description:
CI

Tools & Plugins

  • TeamCity Performance Tests Analysis Pluginstars20 - TeamCity plugin to organize simplest performance testing in CI 💀.
  • Sonar JMeter Pluginstars10 - Plugin to collect JMeter performance tests results and display in Sonar dashboard 💀.

    • Tools

    Correlation

  • Siebel CRM Pluginstars11 - JMeter plugin to simplify the scripting of Siebel CRM applications by providing automatic correlations of variables at recording time ❄️.

    • Tools

    Editors

  • jmx.js - Web-based editor for JMeter JMX files 💀.

    • Community

    Blogs

  • JMeter Tips - Blog about Apache JMeter and performance testing of web applications 💀.
  • JMeter Expert Blog - JMeterExpert blog 💀.

    • Related

    Awesome Lists

  • Awesome Software Qualitystars2.1k - A list of free software testing and verification resources.

    • Community

    Q&A

  • r/jmeter on Reddit

    • Trainings & Courses

  • JMeter: Performance and Load Testing (Feb 2019) - By LinkedIn Learning.
  • Advanced JMeter (Jul 2020) - By LinkedIn Learning.
  • Apache JMeter Training - By QAInsights.
  • JMeter Getting Started Course (Apr 2019) - By Pluralsight.

    • Videos

  • JMeter Tutorials - By Automation Step by Step.
  • Learn Apache JMeter Series - By QAInsights.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Feb 8th - Feb 14th, 2021

Tools & Plugins

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Jan 25th - Jan 31st, 2021
item.description:
Performance Testing

RPC Frameworks

  • JMeter gRPC Pluginstars38 - JMeter plugin supports load test gRPC.
  • JMeter Dubbo Pluginstars539 - JMeter plugin for Apache Dubbo.
  • JMeter gRPC Requeststars124 - JMeter gRPC Request load test plugin.

    • Tools

    Plugins

  • JMeter Plugins - Independent set of plugins for Apache JMeter, with plugin manager references many plugins and simplifies installation.
  • Ubik Load Pack - Productivity extensions for Apache JMeter.

    • APM Integration

  • Servers Performance Monitoring Plugin - Server monitoring plugin from JMeter Plugins project.
  • CA App Synthetic Monitor - Transaction monitoring & testing solution with JMeter support.
  • JMeter integration with AppDynamics - APM & EUM solution with JMeter integration.
  • Performance Remediation using New Relic and JMeter: part 1, part 2

    • Community

    Q&A

  • jmeter on Stack Overflow
  • jmeter on Gitter
  • #jmeter on Slack

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Dec 7th - Dec 13th, 2020
item.description:
Best Practices

  • Concurrent, High Throughput Performance Testing with JMeter

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Nov 23rd - Nov 29th, 2020
item.description:

DSL

  • jmeter-groovy-dslstars10 - The Groovy-JMeter project is simple DSL to write JMeter test plans.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Oct 26th - Nov 1st, 2020
item.description:
Cloud Services / SaaS

  • Tricentis Flood - Load testing service with JMeter, Gatling and Selenium scenarios support.

    • Results Processing

    Results Analysis

  • JMeter SLA Reportstars37 - JMeter HTML report generator based on JAMon.

    • Performance Testing

    Streaming Protocols

  • Load testing HLS with Ruby JMeter

    • Community

    Blogs

  • Flood.io Blog - Load testing thoughts, stories and ideas from Flood IO.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Oct 5th - Oct 11th, 2020
item.description:
Automation

DSL

  • Ruby-JMeterstars744 - A Ruby-based DSL for building JMeter test plans.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Sep 21st - Sep 27th, 2020
item.description:
Books

  • Apache JMeter: A Practical Beginner's Guide to Automated Testing and Performance Measurement for Your Websites - By Emily H. Halili (Packt Publishing).
  • Performance Testing with JMeter 2.9 - By Bayo Erinle (Packt Publishing); guide to test web applications using Apache JMeter with practical, hands-on examples.
  • Performance Testing with JMeter, 2nd Edition - By Bayo Erinle (Packt Publishing).
  • Performance Testing with JMeter 3, 3rd Edition - By Bayo Erinle (Packt Publishing).
  • JMeter Cookbook - By Bayo Erinle (Packt Publishing); 70 insightful and practical recipes to help successfully use Apache JMeter.
  • Master Apache JMeter: From load testing to DevOps - By Antonio Gomes Rodrigues, Bruno Demion (Milamber) and Philippe Mouawad (Leanpub, Packt Publishing).

    • Performance Testing

    Mainframe Environments

  • JMeter RTE Pluginstars19 - JMeter RTE (Remote Terminal Emulator protocol) plugin for testing Mainframe applications.

    • Tools

    Correlation

  • Correlation Recorder Pluginstars22 - JMeter plugin that simplifies the process of recording for applications with Dynamic Variables by providing automatic correlations of variables at recording time.
  • ULP Auto-correlator Plugin - Commercial plugin for Oracle and Vaadin-based applications from Ubik Load Pack.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Aug 31st - Sep 6th, 2020
item.description:
Results Processing

Results Analysis

  • JtlReporterstars73 - Online reporting application to generate reports by uploading JTL file.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Aug 24th - Aug 30th, 2020
item.description:
Automation

Conversion

  • swaggerjmxstars89 - Tool to convert Swagger UI specification into JMeter test plans.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Aug 17th - Aug 23rd, 2020
item.description:
CI

Tools & Plugins

  • Taurus JMeter Executor - JMeter Executor in Taurus automation framework.
  • PerfAction for JMeter - GitHub Action to run performance tests using Apache JMeter and its plugins.

item.description:
JMeter Performance

  • JMeter Performance and Tuning Tips - By Ubik Ingenierie.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Apr 13th - Apr 19th, 2020
item.description:

Tools & Plugins

  • Bamboo JMeter Aggregator Plugin - Bamboo plugin to collect, assert and graph JMeter test results.

  • BlazeMeter University - By BlazeMeter.
  • JMeter Courses collection - By Udemy.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Mar 23rd - Mar 29th, 2020

Streaming Protocols

  • HLS JMeter Pluginstars37

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Mar 9th - Mar 15th, 2020
item.description:
Automation

Frameworks

  • Performance testing frameworkstars342 - Framework both for backend load testing with Apache JMeter and frontend load testing with sitespeed.io + webpagetest private instance.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Mar 2nd - Mar 8th, 2020
item.description:
Related

Awesome Lists

  • Awesome Tsungstars15 - Open-source multi-protocol distributed load testing tool, developed in Erlang.
  • Awesome Gatlingstars41 - Open-source load and performance testing framework based on Scala, Akka and Netty.

    • Community

    Forums

  • JMeter Google Group
  • JMeterPlugins Google Group

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Feb 24th - Mar 1st, 2020
item.description:
Results Processing

Results Analysis

  • DB Results Collectors
    • JMeter DBCollector Plugin - Plugin to enable results logging into a database for more effective reporting.
    • JMeter MySQLCollector Plugin - Patch to configure listener to log into MySQL database.

    • Results Processing

    Results Visualization

  • ELK Stack
    • Using ELK - Using Elasticsearch, Logstash, and Kibana to visualize JMeter test results.
    • JMeter + ElasticSearch Live Monitoring - Using the ElasticSearch Backend listener and Grafana/Kibana to monitor results in real time.
    • jmeter-logstashstars6 - Parse JTL result with Docker and Logstash in real time or after test end, and send data to Elasticsearch or InfluxDb, to have a nice dashboard and compare different tests.
  • Prometheus
    • jmeter-prometheus-pluginstars142 - A Prometheus Listener for Apache JMeter that exposes results in HTTP API.
    • jmeter-prometheus-listenerstars14 - Apache JMeter Backend Listener implementation for Prometheus metrics exporting.
  • ClickHouse
    • JMeter Results from ClickHouse - Using the JMeter Listener pack, ClickHouse and Grafana to collect and monitor test results.
    • jmeter-clickhouse-listener - JMeter plugin allows to write load test data on-the-fly to ClickHouse.
  • Backend Listener Implementations
    • jmeter-elasticsearch-backend-listenerstars91 - JMeter plugin to send test results to an ElasticSearch engine.
    • jmeter-backend-azurestars29 - JMeter plugin to send test results to Azure Application Insights.
    • jmeter-backend-listener-kafkastars25 - JMeter plugin to send test results to a Kafka server.
    • jmeter-listener - JMeter plugin to write load test data on-the-fly to ClickHouse, InfluxDB, ElasticSearch.
    • jmeter-influxdb2-listener-pluginstars61 - InfluxDB v2.0 listener plugin for Apache JMeter.
    • jmeter-datadog-backend-listenerstars6 - Send JMeter test results to Datadog.
    • jmeter-dynatrace-pluginstars10 - A JMeter Backend listener implementation to send the recorded load test metrics via the Dynatrace MINT metric ingest to the configured Dynatrace monitoring environment.
    • jmeter-backend-newrelicstars3 - A JMeter plugin to send test results to New Relic Metrics API.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Feb 17th - Feb 23rd, 2020
item.description:
Automation

Packages

  • loadteststars88 - An R package for load testing using JMeter.

    • Results Processing

    Results Visualization

  • InfluxDB & Grafana
    • Using JMeter with InfluxDB & Grafana - Collection of guides to collect and visualize real-time test results and server monitoring stats using InfluxDB & Grafana.
    • How to Use Grafana to Monitor JMeter Non-GUI Results
    • jmeterReportsstars23 - Autogenerated JMeter test-run results reported into Confluence, using Grafana custom dashboards 🇷🇺.
    • InfluxDB Community Template for JMeter - Prepackaged InfluxDB configurations that contain everything from dashboards and Telegraf configurations to notifications and alerts in a single manifest file.
    • Grafana Dashboards
      • JMeter Load Test Dashboard - Grafana dashboard shows live load test metrics provided by JMeter (by NovaTec-APM).
      • JMeter Dashboard using Core InfluxdbBackendListenerClient - Monitor your Apache JMeter load test in real time with InfluxDB and Grafana (by Philippe M).
      • JMeter Dashboard (3.2 and up) - Monitor JMeter load test in real time with InfluxDB and Grafana (by adrianbanu).
      • JMeter (via prometheus exporter) - A Grafana dashboard to inspect JMeter metrics via Prometheus exporter (by chiabre).
    • JMeter-InfluxBD-Writer Pluginstars78 - JMeter plugin to write load test data on-the-fly into InfluxDB.
    • JMeter Results to InfluxDBstars9 - Read JMeter results from csv file and put into InfluxDB database.
  • Custom & Deprecated
    • Using Matplotlib & Python - Plotting JMeter load test results with Matplotlib plotting tool and Python.
    • Statistical Aggregate Report - Custom Statistical Aggregate Report listener for enhanced results visualization.
    • JChavstars3 - JMeter Chart History and Visualization library.
    • JMeter Dashboard: howto, sourcesstars7 - Real-time monitoring of JMeter load test.
    • Using CMDRunner & Powershell - Create JMeter graphs with CMDRunner with powershell parallel execution.
    • JMeter Graph Tool Maven Pluginstars5 - Maven plugin to create graphs and filter results using CMDRunner and Filter Results Tools from JMeter Plugins; usually used along with the JMeter Maven Plugin.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Feb 10th - Feb 16th, 2020
item.description:
Official Resources

  • Mailing Lists - Apache JMeter mailing lists.

    • Distributions

  • Download Apache JMeter - Apache JMeter: Official downloads.
  • JMeter Bootstrapstars38 - Solution to setup JMeter and JMeter plugins, suitable to be used as a submodule.

    • Best Practices

  • JMeter Official Best Practices

    • CI

    Tools & Plugins

  • Lightning - Framework to integrate JMeter non-functional tests with CI/CD server.

    • Distributed Testing

  • JMeter Distributed Testing Step-by-step
  • JMeter Remote Testing

    • Cloud Services / SaaS

  • RedLine13 - AWS-based load testing service with JMeter, Gatling and Selenium scenarios support.

    • Results Processing

  • JMeter Report Dashboard - JMeter supports dashboard report generation to get graphs and statistics from a test plan.

    • Community

    Blogs

  • Ubik Load Pack Blog - Ubik Ingenierie blog.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Feb 3rd - Feb 9th, 2020
item.description:
Getting Started

  • A Simple Load Test with JMeter

    • CI

    Tools & Plugins

  • Jenkins Performance Plugin - Jenkins plugin to capture reports from JMeter and generate graphic charts with the trend report of performance and robustness.

    • Cloud Services / SaaS

  • LoadRunner Cloud - Micro Focus cloud-based solution for web and mobile performance testing with JMeter and Gatling support (formerly HP StormRunner Load).
  • Loadium - AWS-based load testing service with JMeter and Selenium support.

    • Results Processing

    Results Analysis

  • JMeter Log Analysis - Suggestions and recipes for JMeter log analysis.
  • JMeter Results Analyser - Web-based application for collating, analysing and reporting JMeter test results.

    • Tools

    Extending JMeter

  • How to create a plugin in JMeter

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Jan 13th - Jan 19th, 2020
item.description:
Books

  • JMeter by Example - By Sai Matam and Jagdeep Jain (Leanpub); a simple, practical, step-by-step tutorial to measure the performance of websites.
  • Advanced JMeter Testing - By Penny Curich (Leanpub), guide to write custom components for Apache JMeter 5.0.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Jan 6th - Jan 12th, 2020
item.description:
Tools

IDE Integration

  • Intellij IDEA IDE Plugin - Create run configurations and run JMeter tests from Intellij IDEA.
  • JMeter + Eclipse HOWTO - Develop the JMeter project with Eclipse IDE.

    • Tools

    Editors

  • JMX Enhancer - A solution to expedite preparation of JMeter test plans.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Dec 23rd - Dec 29th, 2019
item.description:
Getting Started

  • Getting Started with Apache JMeter

    • Best Practices

  • JMeter Best Practices
  • Optimize JMeter for Large Scale Tests

    • Results Processing

    Results Analysis

  • JAnalyser - Browser-based results analysis tool.

    • Tips & Tricks

  • JMeter tips - JMeter tips and tricks scratchpad.

    • Trainings & Courses

  • JMeter Training Courses - By NobleProg.
  • Web Applications (and Mobile Apps) Performance Testing with JMeter - By Pragmatic Test Labs.
  • Training courses on Load Testing with Apache JMeter - By Ubik Ingenierie.

    • Community

    Blogs

  • JMeter Blog - Another blog for performance & automation testing using JMeter.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Nov 11th - Nov 17th, 2019

Tools & Plugins

  • TeamCity
    • How to Run JMeter Tests with TeamCity for Continuous Integration
  • CircleCI
    • How to integrate JMeter into CircleCI

  • Easy and realistic Load Testing of HTTP Live Streaming (HLS) with Apache JMeter
  • Using JMeter to Load Test Live HLS Concurrency of Wowza Streaming Engine

    • Automation

    Frameworks

  • Taurus - Automation-friendly framework for Continuous Testing.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Oct 21st - Oct 27th, 2019
item.description:
CI

Tools & Plugins

  • JMeter Maven Pluginstars398 - Maven plugin that provides the ability to run JMeter tests as part of the build.

    • CI

    Tutorials & Demo

  • Jenkins
    • Performance Tests with JMeter, Maven and Hudson
    • CI with Jenkins, Git, Maven, Grunt, and JMeterstars18
    • Continuous automated web tests using Jenkins and JMeter
    • Automating JMeter tests with Maven and Jenkins
    • How to automate JMeter tests with Maven and Jenkins: part 1, part 2
    • JMeter Continuous Performance Testing (JMeter + Ant + Jenkins): part 1, part 2
    • Continuous Integration 101: How to Run JMeter with Jenkins
  • Bamboo
    • How to Run JMeter in a Continuous Integration Environment with Bamboo
  • SonarQube
    • JMeter with Sonar

    • Distributed Testing

  • Setting up a JMeter Cluster for web server load testing

    • JMeter Performance

  • JMeter Performance - JMeter performance evolution across versions.

    • Related

  • Awesome Testingstars1k - A curated list of testing resources.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Oct 14th - Oct 20th, 2019
item.description:
Official Resources

  • Apache JMeter Project - Apache JMeter official website.
  • GitHub Repositorystars6.5k - Apache JMeter source code repository.
  • JMeter Wiki - Apache JMeter official documentation.
  • Issue Tracking - Apache JMeter issue tracking system.

    • Distributions

  • JMeter for Windows - Package for installation JMeter with plugins.

    • Tools

    Extending JMeter

  • JMeter Developer Manual
  • How to write a plugin for JMeter
  • Implement Custom JMeter Samplers

    • Community

    Blogs

  • OctoPerf Blog - OctoPerf blog about JMeter and load testing.
  • Abstracta JMeter Archives - Abstracta blog about JMeter.

    • Performance Testing

    Mobile Apps

  • Record iOS application HTTP requests

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Oct 7th - Oct 13th, 2019
item.description:
Community

Twitter

  • @masterjmeter - Official account of the Master Apache JMeter from Load Testing to DevOps book.
  • @ubikloadpack - Twitter account of Ubik Load Pack, custom JMeter plugins for Video Streaming & complex protocols load testing.

    • Scripting

  • Testing with Groovy - Using JMeter and Groovy for load testing.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Oct 16th - Oct 22nd, 2017
item.description:

Results Analysis

  • JMeter Result Analysis: The Ultimate Guide

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter May 1st - May 7th, 2017
item.description:

Blogs

  • TestAutomationGuru Blog - Technical blog on test automation.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Jan 9th - Jan 15th, 2017
item.description:
Community

Blogs

  • RedLine13 Blog - JMeter articles in RedLine13 blog.

    • Community

    Twitter

  • @ApacheJMeter - Official Twitter account of the Apache JMeter load testing tool.
  • @jmeter_plugins - Twitter account of custom plugins project for JMeter load testing tool.
  • @BlazeMeter - Official Twitter account of Blazemeter, performance engineering platform for DevOps, based on JMeter.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Oct 17th - Oct 23rd, 2016
item.description:
Results Processing

Results Analysis

  • Analyzing JMeter Results
  • JMeter Result Analysis Pluginstars56 - Maven plugin that parses JMeter test results and generates detailed reports with charts.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Mar 7th - Mar 13th, 2016
item.description:
Distributed Testing

  • Dockerized
    • Dockerized JMeter - Distributed load testing workflow with Docker and JMeter.
    • JMeter Docker Images
    • Distributed JMeter testing using Docker
    • A Docker solution to JMeter + InfluxDB + Grafana performance testing
    • AutoMeterstars53 - An automation tool for scaling load tests using distributed slaves, based on JMeter master-slave architecture.
  • Testing in Cloud
    • Kubernetes
      • jmeter-kubernetesstars312 - JMeter cluster support for Kubernetes and OpenShift.
      • jmeter-k8s-starterkitstars45 - JMeter k8s starter kit, with live test reporting, JMeter monitoring, k8s monitoring and mock as a service.
      • kangalstars132 - Kubernetes and Go Automatic Loader solution to run performance tests in Kubernetes cluster using multiple load generators.
      • aks_testing_fwkstars33 - AKS-based scalable JMeter test framework with Grafana reporting.
    • Amazon Web Services
      • jmeter-ec2stars454 - Automates running Apache JMeter on Amazon EC2.
      • geestars16 - A modified version of JMeter-EC2 project.
      • os-jmeter-awsstars1 - Run JMeter on multiple Amazon EC2 instances, view results in ELK.
      • Load Testing with JMeter and Amazon EC2
      • Performance Testing in the Cloud with JMeter & AWS
      • JMeter distributed testing with Amazon EC2
    • DigitalOcean
      • Lightweight JMeter Cloud - Building your own JMeter Cloud using DigitalOcean, JMeter and Docker.
    • Microsoft Azure
      • Load Testing Pipeline with JMeter, ACI and Terraformstars117 - Scalable cloud load/stress testing pipeline solution with Apache JMeter and Terraform to dynamically provision and destroy the required infrastructure on Azure.

item.title: aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter Feb 8th - Feb 14th, 2016
item.description:
Tools

Extending JMeter

  • Custom JMeter Samplers and Config Elements
